2022/11/30 10:19:02 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBExec Выполнена SQL команда. (Строк изменено - 1) INSERT INTO QUERY (ID_CONNECTION, NAME, QUERY, REM) VALUES ('133', 'Тест WF', 'WITH
pr_resh as (
Select
PGI.PERSNUM
, PGI.FAMILY
, PGI.NAME
, PGI.PATR
, TP.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS
, P.DATEOFCOMMING
, T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION
, P.ID_DEPARTMENT
, KL.RAION
, p.ID_STATUS
, P.ID_PROCESS
FROM DB2ADMIN.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO AS PGI
INNER JOIN (Select * from DB2ADMIN.PROCESSES where id_status<>4 and ID_TYPE_PROCESS IN (567,537,560)) P ON PGI.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MAX(DATEOFCOMPLATION) AS DATEOFCOMPLATION FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS WHERE ID_STAGE_TO IN (16406,16522,15848,16226) GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_OV ON T_OV.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MIN(DATEOFCOMMING) AS DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_START ON T_START.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, ID_USER, TASKS.DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS) AS T_STARTUSER ON T_STARTUSER.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS AND T_STARTUSER.DATEOFCOMMING=T_START.DATEOFCOMMING
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.TYPE_PROCESS AS TP ON TP.ID_TYPE_PROCESS=P.ID_TYPE_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.C_UPFR AS KL ON KL.ID=P.ID_DEPARTMENT
WHERE T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION is not null),
pr_p as (
Select pr.id_process,pgi1.PERSNUM,pr.DATEOFCOMMING,pr.DATEOFCOMPLETION,pr.id_status from (Select id_process,P1.DATEOFCOMMING,P1.DATEOFCOMPLETION,p1.id_status from db2admin.processes p1 where p1.id_status<>4 and
exists (Select 1 from db2admin.type_process tp where tp.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS = ''Переплата'' and p1.id_type_process = tp.id_type_process)) pr
inner join db2admin.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO pgi1 on pgi1.ID_PROCESS = pr.id_process --where pr.DATEOFCOMMING >=
)
Select pr_resh2.*,
pr_p2.id_process id_process1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING DATEOFCOMMING1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMPLETION DATEOFCOMPLETION1
,pr_p2.id_status id_status1,pr_p2.c_pr_p from (Select pr_resh.*,pr_resh2.c_pr_resh from (Select PERSNUM,count(*) c_pr_resh from pr_resh group by PERSNUM) pr_resh2
inner join pr_resh on pr_resh.PERSNUM = pr_resh2.PERSNUM) pr_resh2
left join (Select pr_p.*, c_pr_p from pr_p
inner join (Select persnum,count(*) c_pr_p from pr_p group by PERSNUM) pr_p1 on pr_p.persnum = pr_p1.persnum) pr_p2 on pr_p2.persnum = pr_resh2.persnum
where (c_pr_resh<>c_pr_p or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING<pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING is null or pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING is null )', 'Тест WF')

2022/11/30 10:19:27 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH
pr_resh as (
Select
PGI.PERSNUM
, PGI.FAMILY
, PGI.NAME
, PGI.PATR
, TP.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS
, P.DATEOFCOMMING
, T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION
, P.ID_DEPARTMENT
, KL.RAION
, p.ID_STATUS
, P.ID_PROCESS
FROM DB2ADMIN.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO AS PGI
INNER JOIN (Select * from DB2ADMIN.PROCESSES where id_status<>4 and ID_TYPE_PROCESS IN (567,537,560)) P ON PGI.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MAX(DATEOFCOMPLATION) AS DATEOFCOMPLATION FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS WHERE ID_STAGE_TO IN (16406,16522,15848,16226) GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_OV ON T_OV.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MIN(DATEOFCOMMING) AS DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_START ON T_START.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, ID_USER, TASKS.DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS) AS T_STARTUSER ON T_STARTUSER.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS AND T_STARTUSER.DATEOFCOMMING=T_START.DATEOFCOMMING
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.TYPE_PROCESS AS TP ON TP.ID_TYPE_PROCESS=P.ID_TYPE_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.C_UPFR AS KL ON KL.ID=P.ID_DEPARTMENT
WHERE T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION is not null),
pr_p as (
Select pr.id_process,pgi1.PERSNUM,pr.DATEOFCOMMING,pr.DATEOFCOMPLETION,pr.id_status from (Select id_process,P1.DATEOFCOMMING,P1.DATEOFCOMPLETION,p1.id_status from db2admin.processes p1 where p1.id_status<>4 and
exists (Select 1 from db2admin.type_process tp where tp.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS = 'Переплата' and p1.id_type_process = tp.id_type_process)) pr
inner join db2admin.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO pgi1 on pgi1.ID_PROCESS = pr.id_process --where pr.DATEOFCOMMING >=
)
Select pr_resh2.*,
pr_p2.id_process id_process1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING DATEOFCOMMING1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMPLETION DATEOFCOMPLETION1
,pr_p2.id_status id_status1,pr_p2.c_pr_p from (Select pr_resh.*,pr_resh2.c_pr_resh from (Select PERSNUM,count(*) c_pr_resh from pr_resh group by PERSNUM) pr_resh2
inner join pr_resh on pr_resh.PERSNUM = pr_resh2.PERSNUM) pr_resh2
left join (Select pr_p.*, c_pr_p from pr_p
inner join (Select persnum,count(*) c_pr_p from pr_p group by PERSNUM) pr_p1 on pr_p.persnum = pr_p1.persnum) pr_p2 on pr_p2.persnum = pr_resh2.persnum
where (c_pr_resh<>c_pr_p or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING<pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING is null or pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING is null )

2022/12/02 14:37:19 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBOpen Подтверждено соединение (ping) с базой WF
2022/12/02 14:38:00 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH
pr_resh as (
Select
PGI.PERSNUM
, PGI.FAMILY
, PGI.NAME
, PGI.PATR
, TP.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS
, P.DATEOFCOMMING
, T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION
, P.ID_DEPARTMENT
, KL.RAION
, p.ID_STATUS
, P.ID_PROCESS
FROM DB2ADMIN.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO AS PGI
INNER JOIN (Select * from DB2ADMIN.PROCESSES where id_status<>4 and ID_TYPE_PROCESS IN (567,537,560)) P ON PGI.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MAX(DATEOFCOMPLATION) AS DATEOFCOMPLATION FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS WHERE ID_STAGE_TO IN (16406,16522,15848,16226) GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_OV ON T_OV.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, MIN(DATEOFCOMMING) AS DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS GROUP BY ID_PROCESS) AS T_START ON T_START.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID_PROCESS, ID_USER, TASKS.DATEOFCOMMING FROM DB2ADMIN.TASKS) AS T_STARTUSER ON T_STARTUSER.ID_PROCESS=P.ID_PROCESS AND T_STARTUSER.DATEOFCOMMING=T_START.DATEOFCOMMING
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.TYPE_PROCESS AS TP ON TP.ID_TYPE_PROCESS=P.ID_TYPE_PROCESS
LEFT JOIN DB2ADMIN.C_UPFR AS KL ON KL.ID=P.ID_DEPARTMENT
WHERE T_OV.DATEOFCOMPLATION is not null),
pr_p as (
Select pr.id_process,pgi1.PERSNUM,pr.DATEOFCOMMING,pr.DATEOFCOMPLETION,pr.id_status from (Select id_process,P1.DATEOFCOMMING,P1.DATEOFCOMPLETION,p1.id_status from db2admin.processes p1 where p1.id_status<>4 and
exists (Select 1 from db2admin.type_process tp where tp.DESCRIPTION_PROCESS = 'Переплата' and p1.id_type_process = tp.id_type_process)) pr
inner join db2admin.PROCESS_GENERAL_INFO pgi1 on pgi1.ID_PROCESS = pr.id_process --where pr.DATEOFCOMMING >=
)
Select pr_resh2.*,
pr_p2.id_process id_process1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING DATEOFCOMMING1,pr_p2.DATEOFCOMPLETION DATEOFCOMPLETION1
,pr_p2.id_status id_status1,pr_p2.c_pr_p from (Select pr_resh.*,pr_resh2.c_pr_resh from (Select PERSNUM,count(*) c_pr_resh from pr_resh group by PERSNUM) pr_resh2
inner join pr_resh on pr_resh.PERSNUM = pr_resh2.PERSNUM) pr_resh2
left join (Select pr_p.*, c_pr_p from pr_p
inner join (Select persnum,count(*) c_pr_p from pr_p group by PERSNUM) pr_p1 on pr_p.persnum = pr_p1.persnum) pr_p2 on pr_p2.persnum = pr_resh2.persnum
where (c_pr_resh<>c_pr_p or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING<pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING or pr_p2.DATEOFCOMMING is null or pr_resh2.DATEOFCOMMING is null )

2022/12/02 14:38:14 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса SELECT * FROM QUERY AS Q INNER JOIN CONNECTION AS C ON Q.ID_CONNECTION=C.ID AND Q.ID=3
2022/12/02 14:38:14 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBOpen Подтверждено соединение (ping) с базой PFRRECDB (Предварительная запись АРХ)
2022/12/02 14:38:17 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 14:38:27 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from

WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",

FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt

WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 14:38:36 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),

union all

--пишем дни исключения
)

Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 14:38:45 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)

2022/12/02 14:38:57 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBOpen Подтверждено соединение (ping) с базой PFRRECDB (Предварительная запись АРХ)
2022/12/02 14:39:00 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район" 
2022/12/02 14:39:00 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBClose Соединение с базой PFRRECDB (Предварительная запись АРХ) успешно закрыто

GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 14:39:08 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 14:39:18 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),

Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),

--пишем дни исключения

FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"

2022/12/02 15:38:23 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
),
dummy3(id,dw) as (
select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY
--пишем дни исключения
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),'39', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from
(
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then '+' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then '+' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Вт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'Ср'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Чт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'Пт'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'Сб'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Вс'
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'Пн'
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (нормативное время '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' мин.)' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER

(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" like '%Материнский (семейный) капитал%' and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)')and"Район" not in ('ОПФР по Архангельской области') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район"
